news.t: Irish Central Bank Cuts Growth Forecast as Volatility Roils Eurozone
Popular Irish ETF skids lower after Sinn Fein election win

holdings.infoBox: EIRL is an equity ETF with a total of 34 individual holdings. The top holdings are Bank of Ireland Group stock at 15.73%, AIB Group at 14.27%, Kerry Group at 10.03%, Kingspan Group at 5.60%, and ICON Public Limited Company at 5.38%.

overview.description: The iShares MSCI Ireland ETF (EIRL) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the MSCI All Ireland Capped index, a market-cap-weighted index of Irish firms. EIRL was launched on May 5, 2010 and is issued by BlackRock.

data.title: Irish Central Bank Cuts Growth Forecast as Volatility Roils Eurozone
data.text: The central bank now expects GDP to fall by 2.7% this year due to a large drop in U.S. exports, having forecast in March that it would grow by 1.3%.

data.title: Popular Irish ETF skids lower after Sinn Fein election win
data.text: An exchange-traded fund that tracks shares of Irish companies declined on Monday morning after general election results perceived as less investor-friendly.
